# `loans` - database schema slice

Source of truth: [`backend/prisma/schema.prisma`](../../../prisma/schema.prisma).
This file mirrors the Prisma models owned by this feature so the schema is
co-located with the code that reads/writes it. Regenerate via:

```bash
pwsh backend/scripts/scaffold-feature-schemas.ps1
```

## `Loan`

```prisma
model Loan {
  id                 String        @id @default(uuid())
  userId             String
  deviceId           String?
  type               String
  name               String
  principalAmount    Decimal       @db.Decimal(12, 2)
  outstandingBalance Decimal       @db.Decimal(12, 2) // Computed by trigger: principalAmount - sum(payments)
  interestRate       Decimal?      @db.Decimal(12, 2)
  emiAmount          Decimal?      @db.Decimal(12, 2)
  dueDate            DateTime?
  frequency          String?
  status             String        @default("active")
  contactPerson      String?
  syncStatus         String        @default("synced")
  clientRequestId    String?       @unique
  // â”€â”€â”€ Extended fields (schema alignment with Dexie client) â”€â”€â”€
  totalPayable       Decimal?      @db.Decimal(12, 2)
  loanDate           DateTime?
  contactEmail       String?
  contactPhone       String?
  bankName           String?
  tenureMonths       Int?
  downPayment        Decimal?      @db.Decimal(12, 2)
  loanCategory       String?
  notes              String?
  createdAt          DateTime      @default(now())
  updatedAt          DateTime      @updatedAt
  deletedAt          DateTime?
  user               User          @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  payments           LoanPayment[]

  @@index([dueDate])
  @@index([status])
  @@index([syncStatus])
  @@index([userId])
  @@index([createdAt])
  @@index([deletedAt])
  @@schema("public")
}
```

## `LoanPayment`

```prisma
model LoanPayment {
  id        String    @id @default(uuid())
  loanId    String
  amount    Decimal   @db.Decimal(12, 2)
  accountId String?
  date      DateTime
  notes     String?
  createdAt DateTime  @default(now())
  deletedAt DateTime? // Added for soft-delete consistency
  loan      Loan      @relation(fields: [loanId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@index([date])
  @@index([loanId])
  @@index([deletedAt])
  @@schema("public")
}
```
